scenarios.description: appendChild(null) throws NullPointerException when child is null
appendChild(child) on empty childNodes creates new NodeList and sets sibling index to 0
scenarios.precondition: Element parent = new Element("div"); Node child = new Element("span");
scenarios.expectedResult: parent.childNodeSize() == 1 and child.parent() == parent and child.siblingIndex() == 0 and returns parent
pseudocode: Element parent = new Element("div"); Node child = new Element("span");
assert parent.childNodeSize() == 1; assert child.parent() == parent; assert child.siblingIndex() == 0; assert result == parent;

scenarios.description: appendChild(child) on non-empty childNodes does not recreate list and sets sibling index to 1
scenarios.precondition: Element parent = new Element("div"); Node first = new Element("p"); parent.appendChild(first); Node second = new Element("a");
scenarios.expectedResult: parent.childNodeSize() == 2 and second.parent() == parent and second.siblingIndex() == 1
pseudocode: Element parent = new Element("div"); Node first = new Element("p"); parent.appendChild(first); Node second = new Element("a");
assert parent.childNodeSize() == 2; assert second.parent() == parent; assert second.siblingIndex() == 1;

scenarios.description: appendChild(child) reparents from old parent to new parent removing from original
scenarios.precondition: Element oldParent = new Element("ul"); Element newParent = new Element("ol"); Element item = new Element("li"); oldParent.appendChild(item);
scenarios.expectedResult: oldParent.childrenSize() == 0 and newParent.childrenSize() == 1 and item.parent() == newParent
pseudocode: Element oldParent = new Element("ul"); Element newParent = new Element("ol"); Element item = new Element("li"); oldParent.appendChild(item);
assert oldParent.childrenSize() == 0; assert newParent.childrenSize() == 1; assert item.parent() == newParent;
